personalInfo.name: Karthick
personalInfo.title: Junior Software Engineer
personalInfo.heroBio: Software Engineer with production experience across backend development, Docker containerization, and CI/CD pipelines. I specialize in building reliable systems, REST APIs, and automated deployment workflows.
personalInfo.bio: I am a passionate Software Engineer with hands-on industry experience, including practical experience in DevOps. I build REST APIs in Node.js, Express, and Java Spring Boot. I have integrated Azure AI services, managed PostgreSQL logical replication, built Grafana dashboards, and contributed to CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps and GitHub Actions. I enjoy solving complex problems and building scalable, reliable, and production-ready backend systems.

projects.title: Gemini Chatbot
projects.description: Built a REST API using Spring Boot with a clean controller/service pattern; integrated Google Gemini API to handle AI prompt requests.

projects.title: Southern Spice UI
projects.description: A modern, responsive restaurant web application emphasizing efficient data management through props and a robust component structure.

projects.title: DocFlow Rule Engine Component
projects.description: Engineered rule-processing logic and modular Express middleware in TypeScript, integrating Azure Document Intelligence REST API.

projects.title: Railway Ticket Reservation
projects.description: A comprehensive system offering features like ticket booking, cancellation, waiting list management, and RAC.

projects.title: QR Code Generator
projects.description: A responsive and interactive QR code generator built with NodeJS, HTML, and CSS.

projects.title: FarAway
projects.description: A React-based tour packing list application utilizing state management to streamline packing with interactive item tracking.

projects.title: URL Shortener
projects.description: A fast and efficient URL shortener service to generate and manage compact links.
